== Notes for [[Item:Q118968|Q118968]] ==

SURN Calahorra
GIVN Theresa
AFN 9HM5-S4
_UID D0AC968ABF9F364C96D267D7C3FC7E85E467
1 UID C47B420EEB784E4A9A9F8C19AC4F5802BDD6
1 UID BDE9F67B96B3D24588D0F33CDEC5490AF4B5
DATE 21 May 2009
TIME 19:23:43

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
